overview: I built a PM Knowledge Assistant using Claude + ChromaDB, implementing a full RAG pipeline with hybrid search, re-ranking, and metadata filtering. RAG grounded Claude to my Q3 data (2.3% lift) vs.

keyPoints.title: RAG cited specific 2.3% lift vs. generic 5-15% benchmarks
Embeddings cost near-zero; cosine similarity 3x higher for related topics
Re-ranking with Haiku pruned irrelevant chunks distance scores missed
System prompt guardrails prevent hallucination — not RAG alone
